fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the posted document to which the certificate of supply applies.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the posted shipment document associated with the certificate of supply.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status for documents where you must receive a signed certificate of supply from the customer.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the receipt date of the signed certificate of supply.

fields.name: Printed
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the certificate of supply has been printed and sent to the customer.

fields.name: Customer/Vendor Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer or vendor.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the delivery conditions of the related shipment, such as free on board (FOB).

fields.name: Shipment/Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that the posted shipment was shipped or posted.

fields.name: Ship-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Customer/Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer or vendor.

fields.name: Vehicle Registration No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vehicle registration number associated with the shipment.
